div.p: Diversity over pure proximity for graph navigability

text.tspan: // Check if candidate is closer to query
// Check if candidate is closer to query

div.p: Simple: A, B, C selected (all clustered) Heuristic: A, D selected (diverse directions) Clustered neighbors limit graph reachability
Key Insight: Simple selection creates "local traps" where greedy search cannot escape clustered regions. Heuristic maintains long-range connections that enable navigation across the graph.
